row_level_ablation_rows.name: floor_only
row_level_ablation_rows.interpretation: Strongest/teacher floor reference; all improvements are zero by definition.

row_level_ablation_rows.name: stage42j_static_expert_only
row_level_ablation_rows.interpretation: Uses the static-gated full-waypoint expert without Stage42-P/UCY integration.

row_level_ablation_rows.name: stage42p_gain_harm_only
row_level_ablation_rows.interpretation: Uses the t50 gain/harm selector source without Stage42-J/UCY integration.

row_level_ablation_rows.name: stage42s_combo_no_ucy_source
row_level_ablation_rows.interpretation: Stage42-S row combo leaves UCY fallback-only; loss vs Stage42-X quantifies UCY full-waypoint source contribution.

row_level_ablation_rows.name: stage42x_unified_full
row_level_ablation_rows.interpretation: Full Stage42-X row-level merged cache over ETH_UCY, TrajNet, and UCY.

full_waypoint_context.interpretation: Stage42-C is earlier full-waypoint evidence; Stage42-X supersedes it for unified ETH_UCY/TrajNet/UCY row-level cache.

ablation_rows.interpretation: History is strongly positive in the retrained causal sequence model; Stage42-G/I also provide fresh secondary evidence.
Neighbor/density/TTC features are positive in the ridge retrained ablation, but sequence/full-waypoint evidence is mixed.
Scene/goal proxy contributes in Stage42-G; Stage42-H goal/scene sequence evidence is mixed and must not be overclaimed.
Goal/prototype features are positive in Stage42-G, while sequence-level goal/scene evidence remains mixed.
Interaction proxy contributes in Stage42-G; neighbor/interaction sequence evidence remains mixed.
JEPA-only architecture evidence is cached verified and negative/unsafe; Stage42 does not have a fresh no-JEPA retrain that supports a positive JEPA claim.
This is a fresh transformer-proxy/history-sequence ablation, not a full fresh no-Transformer architecture retrain; cached architecture evidence remains negative/fallback-only.
Removing the teacher floor is unsafe; this is a fresh safety-floor ablation and a negative deployment claim.
Safe-switch contribution is fresh in Stage42-G and separately diagnosed in Stage42-D/E.
Endpoint-linear bridge is a fresh waypoint-space ablation; full-waypoint sequence helps long-horizon slices but not every all-ADE slice.
Removing learned waypoint shape by falling back to endpoint-linear bridge measures full-waypoint shape contribution.
Domain expert is positive in Stage42-H sequence evidence; Stage42-G ridge evidence is near-neutral.
Secondary evidence: full-waypoint sequence history contributes on ADE/FDE t50, but Stage42-I gate remains partial because protected full model was not globally positive.
